data.name: 幻想天蠶變2
data.detailed_description:
經典重製街機遊戲《幻想天蠶變》魅影再臨──《幻想天蠶變2》全新登場！

✦ 撥開迷霧，再次劃出命運的界線

✦ 動態的絕對領域，在指尖微顫中綻放──

【遊戲玩法】━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━◈

♖ 移動：W (▲) / A (◀) / S (▼) / D (▶)

♖ 切割剪影：滑鼠左鍵 (Z鍵 / 空白鍵)

♖ 魔王技能：滑鼠右鍵 (X鍵 / Enter鍵)

♜ 移動＋切割，操控主角在戰場上游走，畫線封區來解放藏於剪影中的禁忌畫面

♜ 佔領關卡技能－魂鐮狂風：全面加速斬敵無雙

♜ 殲滅關卡技能－魔眼凝視：一眼凍結全場敵人

【遊戲特色】━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━◈

♡ 幻想再啟

　天使溫柔低語、惡魔魅惑輕笑──新的身影，新的邂逅……誰將打開你內心最深的渴望？

♡ 撥雲再現

　一筆一劃，揭開衣角迷霧；輕觸即破，驚現令人炙熱的瞬間

♡ 絕美動態

　全新動態CG演出，讓征服女孩的瞬間撼動視覺與心弦

♡ 熱血重燃

　延續前作自由操作，策略與反應交錯激盪

♡ 技巧雙線

　智取突圍or暴力突破──雙路可選，任你主導

♡ 終極收藏

　完整CG&回憶模式，珍藏你與她們的每一次深刻邂逅

【特別感謝】━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━◈

音樂提供：魔王魂

【注意事項】━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━◈

「本作品由知名性愛大師 BangBangKing 結合 AI 精心製作。BangBangKing 擅長呈現豐富多元的性愛角色與動作細節，若您對 AI 輔助創作的內容敏感或不適，建議謹慎選購。」

data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: windows7
  • 處理器: Intel® Core i3
  • 顯示卡: Any
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any

data.name: Re: Gals Panic 2
data.detailed_description:
The classic arcade revival returns—“Fantasy Silken Metamorphosis 2” is here!

✦ Pierce through the mist and once again trace the line of fate
✦ The dynamic Absolute Territory blooms at the trembling of your fingertips──

【Gameplay】━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━◈

♖ Move: W (▲) / A (◀) / S (▼) / D (▶)
♖ Cut silhouette: Left Mouse Button (Z / Spacebar)
♖ Boss Skill: Right Mouse Button (X / Enter)

♜ Move and slice to control your character, drawing lines to enclose and unlock the hidden forbidden image beneath the shadow.
♜ Domination Stage Skill - Soul Scythe Tempest: Boost all speeds, slashing through enemies with ease
♜ Extermination Stage Skill - Evil Eye Stare: Freeze all enemies on the battlefield with a single glance

【Features】━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━◈

♡ Fantasy Reawakened
Angels whisper gently, demons laugh seductively—new faces, new encounters… Who will awaken your deepest desires?

♡ Revealing the Veil
Stroke by stroke, lift the mist from her clothes; a gentle touch brings blazing surprises

♡ Dynamic Beauty
All-new animated CGs shake both the senses and the heart at the moment of conquest

♡ Blood-Boiling Action
Continue the freeform, skill-based gameplay of the previous title with layered strategy and reflex

♡ Dual Paths of Tactics
Sneaky breakthrough or brute force assault—choose your route and take control!

♡ Ultimate Collection
Full CG gallery and memory mode to relive every unforgettable encounter with her

【Special Thanks】━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━◈
Music provided by: 魔王魂

【Notice】━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━◈
This work was carefully crafted by the renowned intimacy master BangBangKing in collaboration with AI. BangBangKing specializes in diverse and detailed character portrayals and actions. If you are sensitive or uncomfortable with AI-assisted creations, please refrain from purchasing.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: windows7
  • Processor: Intel® Core i3
  • Graphics: Any
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
